WHERE [m].[CategoryId] = @__catId_0
ORDER BY [m].[Id], [c].[Id], [a].[Id], [t].[Id]

[o].[WithoutService], [o].[WithoutTax], [o].[ZoneBonus], [o].[ZoneID], [o].[ZoneName], [t].[Id], [t].[DineInOrderId], [t].[Discount], [t].[IsVoided], [t].[MenuSalesItemId], [t].[OrderId], [t].[OrderType], [t].[Quantity], [t].[TotalAfterDiscount], [t].[TotalAmount], [t].[TotalDiscountAmount], [t].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [t].[TotalDiscountPrice], [t].[VoidAmount], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId], [t].[AttributeItemId], [t].[AttributeName], [t].[Id1], [t].[ArabicName], [t].[AttributeId], [t].[AttributePrice], [t].[BackColor], [t].[Barcode], [t].[BranchId], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[CreationDate], [t].[Description], [t].[EnglishName], [t].[FifthPrice], [t].[FourthPrice], [t].[HasAttribute], [t].[ImagePath], [t].[Invisible], [t].[KitchenTypeId], [t].[MainCategoryId], [t].[NormalizedEnglishName], [t].[Price], [t].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [t].[SecondPrice], [t].[Tax], [t].[TextColor], [t].[TextSize], [t].[ThirdPrice], [t].[UpdatedDate]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id1], [m].[ArabicName], [m].[AttributeId], [m].[AttributePrice], [m].[BackColor], [m].[Barcode], [m].[BranchId], [m].[CategoryId], [m].[CreationDate], [m].[Description], [m].[EnglishName], [m].[FifthPrice], [m].[FourthPrice], [m].[HasAttribute], [m].[ImagePath], [m].[Invisible], [m].[KitchenTypeId], [m].[MainCategoryId], [m].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m].[Price], [m].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m].[SecondPrice], [m].[Tax], [m].[TextColor], [m].[TextSize], [m].[ThirdPrice], [m].[UpdatedDate]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId]

VALUES (@p245, @p246, @p247, @p248, @p249, @p250, @p251, @p252, @p253, @p254, @p255, @p256, @p257, 0),
(@p258, @p259, @p260, @p261, @p262, @p263, @p264, @p265, @p266, @p267, @p268, @p269, @p270, 1)) AS i ([DineInOrderId], [Discount], [IsVoided], [MenuSalesItemId], [OrderId], [OrderType], [Quantity], [TotalAfterDiscount], [TotalAmount], [TotalDiscountAmount], [TotalDiscountPercentage], [TotalDiscountPrice], [VoidAmount], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([DineInOrderId], [Discount], [IsVoided], [MenuSalesItemId], [OrderId], [OrderType], [Quantity], [TotalAfterDiscount], [TotalAmount], [TotalDiscountAmount], [TotalDiscountPercentage], [TotalDiscountPrice], [VoidAmount])

[t].[SecondPrice], [t].[Tax], [t].[TextColor], [t].[TextSize], [t].[ThirdPrice], [t].[UpdatedDate]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id1], [m].[ArabicName], [m].[AttributeId], [m].[AttributePrice], [m].[BackColor], [m].[Barcode], [m].[BranchId], [m].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [m].[CreationDate], [m].[Description], [m].[EnglishName], [m].[FifthPrice], [m].[FourthPrice], [m].[HasAttribute], [m].[ImagePath], [m].[Invisible], [m].[KitchenTypeId], [m].[MainCategoryId], [m].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m].[Price], [m].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m].[SecondPrice], [m].[Tax], [m].[TextColor], [m].[TextSize], [m].[ThirdPrice], [m].[UpdatedDate]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId]

    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id1], [m].[ArabicName], [m].[AttributeId], [m].[AttributePrice], [m].[BackColor], [m].[Barcode], [m].[BranchId], [m].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [m].[CreationDate], [m].[Description], [m].[EnglishName], [m].[FifthPrice], [m].[FourthPrice], [m].[HasAttribute], [m].[ImagePath], [m].[Invisible], [m].[KitchenTypeId], [m].[MainCategoryId], [m].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m].[Price], [m].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m].[SecondPrice], [m].[Tax], [m].[TextColor], [m].[TextSize], [m].[ThirdPrice], [m].[UpdatedDate]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId]

FROM [MenuSalesItems] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Attributes] AS [a] ON [m].[AttributeId] = [a].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[AppearanceIndex], [a0].[AttributeId], [a0].[RelatedMenuItemId], [m0].[Id] AS [Id0], [m0].[ArabicName], [m0].[AttributeId] AS [AttributeId0], [m0].[AttributePrice], [m0].[BackColor], [m0].[Barcode], [m0].[BranchId], [m0].[CategoryId], [m0].[CreationDate], [m0].[Description], [m0].[EnglishName], [m0].[FifthPrice], [m0].[FourthPrice], [m0].[HasAttribute], [m0].[ImagePath], [m0].[Invisible], [m0].[KitchenTypeId], [m0].[MainCategoryId], [m0].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m0].[Price], [m0].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m0].[SecondPrice], [m0].[Tax], [m0].[TextColor], [m0].[TextSize], [m0].[ThirdPrice], [m0].[UpdatedDate]
    FROM [AttributeItems] AS [a0]
    INNER JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m0] ON [a0].[RelatedMenuItemId] = [m0].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [a].[Id] = [t].[AttributeId]
WHERE [m].[CategoryId] = @__catId_0
ORDER BY [m].[Id], [c].[Id], [a].[Id], [t].[Id]

    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId]

[t].[AttributeId], [t].[AttributePrice], [t].[BackColor], [t].[Barcode], [t].[BranchId], [t].[CategoryId0], [t].[CreationDate], [t].[Description], [t].[EnglishName], [t].[FifthPrice], [t].[FourthPrice], [t].[HasAttribute], [t].[ImagePath], [t].[Invisible], [t].[KitchenTypeId], [t].[MainCategoryId], [t].[NormalizedEnglishName], [t].[Price], [t].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [t].[SecondPrice], [t].[Tax], [t].[TextColor], [t].[TextSize], [t].[ThirdPrice], [t].[UpdatedDate]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id1], [m].[ArabicName], [m].[AttributeId], [m].[AttributePrice], [m].[BackColor], [m].[Barcode], [m].[BranchId], [m].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [m].[CreationDate], [m].[Description], [m].[EnglishName], [m].[FifthPrice], [m].[FourthPrice], [m].[HasAttribute], [m].[ImagePath], [m].[Invisible], [m].[KitchenTypeId], [m].[MainCategoryId], [m].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m].[Price], [m].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m].[SecondPrice], [m].[Tax], [m].[TextColor], [m].[TextSize], [m].[ThirdPrice], [m].[UpdatedDate]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[OrderItemId]

SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[AddressNotice], [o].[ApartmentNum], [o].[AssignTime], [o].[BackTime], [o].[BranchID], [o].[BranchName], [o].[CaptainTipsDeduction], [o].[CashierID], [o].[CashierName], [o].[ClosingTime], [o].[CustomerCount], [o].[CustomerID], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[DeliveryCompany], [o].[DeliveryCompanyInfoId], [o].[DeliveryFees], [o].[Discount], [o].[DiscountBy], [o].[DiscountByName], [o].[DiscountPercentage], [o].[DiscountReason], [o].[DiscountTime], [o].[DiscountType], [o].[DiscountedItems], [o].[DispatchID], [o].[DriverID], [o].[DriverName], [o].[FloorNum], [o].[FreeItems], [o].[GrandTotal], [o].[HomeNum], [o].[KitchenOutTime], [o].[MachineName], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderNotice], [o].[OrderState], [o].[OrderType], [o].[PackingOutTime], [o].[Paid], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[Phone1], [o].[Phone2], [o].[PrintCount], [o].[Remain], [o].[ReservationPaid], [o].[ReservationRemain], [o].[ScheduleDateTime], [o].[Service], [o].[ShiftID], [o].[StreetName], [o].[Subtotal], [o].[TableID], [o].[TableName], [o].[TableState], [o].[TakeawayCustomerId], [o].[TakeawayCustomerName], [o].[TakeawayCustomerPhone], [o].[TakerID], [o].[TakerName], [o].[Tax], [o].[TitleName], [o].[TotalDiscount], [o].[TotalVoid], [o].[VoidAmount], [o].[VoidBy], [o].[VoidByName], [o].[VoidCount], [o].[VoidReason], [o].[VoidTime], [o].[WaiterID], [o].[WaiterName], [o].[WithoutDeliveryFees], [o].[WithoutService], [o].[WithoutTax], [o].[ZoneBonus], [o].[ZoneID], [o].[ZoneName], [t].[Id], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[CategoryName], [t].[DineInOrderId], [t].[Discount], [t].[IsVoided], [t].[ItemName], [t].[ItemNameAr], [t].[MenuSalesItemId], [t].[OrderId], [t].[OrderType], [t].[Quantity], [t].[TotalAfterDiscount], [t].[TotalAmount], [t].[TotalDiscountAmount], [t].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [t].[TotalDiscountPrice], [t].[UnitPrice], [t].[VoidAmount], [t].[OrderItemId], [t].[AttributeItemId], [t].[AttributeName], [t].[Id0]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id0]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn' AND [o].[OrderState] = N'Pending'
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[OrderItemId]
